raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The 2021-22 State Budget includes funding to establish a statewide Office of School-Based Health within the California Department of Education.",
    "The Office of School-Based Health aims to help K-12 schools increase access to health and mental health services by drawing down federal funds.",
    "The establishment of the Office of School-Based Health is intended to meet the growing demand for student health services as families recover from the COVID-19 pandemic.",
    "The Carter Park Renovation Project includes amphitheater seating, a performing arts stage, and walking trails through existing redwood trees.",
    "The Cloverdale Ranch acquisition will conserve over 6,200 acres of undeveloped land and is characterized by diverse ecosystems including coastal prairies and wetlands.",
    "Cloverdale Ranch supports habitats for important fish species and the federally endangered San Francisco garter snake.",
    "Establishing an open space preserve at Cloverdale Ranch will provide access to currently inaccessible resource lands and sustain local agriculture."
  ]
}
```
